tools.name: placeholder-not-a-real-credential-validate_node
tools.description:
Validate a single node.
Returns True if the node is valid, otherwise raises a ValueError.
If return_validated is True, returns the validated node.
Accepts either a Node object or a JSON string of the Node object.

label.description: The label of the node. Should be in PascalCase.

key_property.description: The key property of the node

name.description: The name of the property. Should be in camelCase.

type.description: The Neo4j type of the property. Should be all caps.

column_name.description: The column name this property maps to, if known.

table_name.description: The name of the table this property's column is in, if known. May also be the name of a file.

location.description: The location of the property, if known. May be a file path, URL, etc.

source.description: The source of the property, if known.

name.description: The name of the property. Should be in camelCase.

type.description: The Neo4j type of the property. Should be all caps.

column_name.description: The column name this property maps to, if known.

table_name.description: The name of the table this property's column is in, if known. May also be the name of a file.

location.description: The location of the property, if known. May be a file path, URL, etc.

source.description: The source of the property, if known.

metadata.description: The metadata of the node. This should only be used when converting data models.

tools.name: placeholder-not-a-real-credential-validate_relationship
tools.description:
Validate a single relationship.
Returns True if the relationship is valid, otherwise raises a ValueError.
If return_validated is True, returns the validated relationship.
Accepts either a Relationship object or a JSON string of the Relationship object.

type.description: The type of the relationship. Should be in SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE.

start_node_label.description: The label of the start node

end_node_label.description: The label of the end node

name.description: The name of the property. Should be in camelCase.

type.description: The Neo4j type of the property. Should be all caps.

column_name.description: The column name this property maps to, if known.

properties.description: The properties of the relationship, if any.

metadata.description: The metadata of the relationship. This should only be used when converting data models.

tools.name: placeholder-not-a-real-credential-validate_data_model
tools.description:
Validate the entire data model.
Returns True if the data model is valid, otherwise raises a ValueError.
If return_validated is True, returns the validated data model.
Accepts either a DataModel object or a JSON string of the DataModel object.

tools.name: placeholder-not-a-real-credential-get_node_cypher_ingest_query
tools.description:
Get the Cypher query to ingest a list of Node records into a Neo4j database.
This should be used to ingest data into a Neo4j database.
This is a parameterized Cypher query that takes a list of records as input to the $records parameter.

label.description: The label of the node. Should be in PascalCase.

key_property.description: The key property of the node

name.description: The name of the property. Should be in camelCase.

type.description: The Neo4j type of the property. Should be all caps.

column_name.description: The column name this property maps to, if known.

table_name.description: The name of the table this property's column is in, if known. May also be the name of a file.

location.description: The location of the property, if known. May be a file path, URL, etc.

source.description: The source of the property, if known.

type.description: The Neo4j type of the property. Should be all caps.

column_name.description: The column name this property maps to, if known.

location.description: The location of the property, if known. May be a file path, URL, etc.

source.description: The source of the property, if known.

metadata.description: The metadata of the node. This should only be used when converting data models.

node.description: The node to get the Cypher query for. Accepts either a Node object or a JSON string of the Node object.

tools.name: placeholder-not-a-real-credential-get_relationship_cypher_ingest_query
tools.description:
Get the Cypher query to ingest a list of Relationship records into a Neo4j database.
This should be used to ingest data into a Neo4j database.
This is a parameterized Cypher query that takes a list of records as input to the $records parameter.
The records must contain the Relationship properties, if any, as well as the sourceId and targetId properties of the start and end nodes respectively.

tools.name: placeholder-not-a-real-credential-get_constraints_cypher_queries
tools.description:
Get the Cypher queries to create constraints on the data model.
This creates range indexes on the key properties of the nodes and relationships and enforces uniqueness and existence of the key properties.
Accepts either a DataModel object or a JSON string of the DataModel object.

tools.name: placeholder-not-a-real-credential-export_to_owl_turtle
tools.description:
Export a data model to an OWL Turtle string.
This process is lossy since OWL does not support properties on relationships.
Returns a string representation of the data model in OWL Turtle format.
Accepts either a DataModel object or a JSON string of the DataModel object.

tools.name: placeholder-not-a-real-credential-export_to_pydantic_models

Accepts either a DataModel object or a JSON string of the DataModel object.
